title: GINMLYDA Pop Secret Diary for Boys with Pen, 8.25x5.7 Inches 160 Pages Spacecraft Fidget Kids Notebook and Pen Set for Boys Birthday Presents A5 Spiral Kids Journal for Boys Gifts 6-12 Year Old
features: 【BLUE POP NOTEBOOK FOR BOYS】- There is a fidget pop spacecraft on the sturdy hardcover of BOYS diary. It makes a soft popping sound when pushed in and popped out, it is fun and stress relief

【LINED SECRET DIARY FOR BOYS】- The hardcover spiral notebook A5 is 160 lined pages (80 sheets) in ivory white thick paper. Twin-wire spiral binding makes the journal for boys not easy to loose pages and opened flat for easily writing

【ROCKET KIDS DIARY WITH PEN】- The boys journal is 8.25x5.7 inches in spiral bound, with one Six-Multicolored ballpoint pen as a gifts for kids. It’s easily carry in their backpack, and they love this new style boys notebook and pen set with unicorn cover & fidget popper, child will have great experience for writing, drawing or doodling with different colored pen

【FUNNY BOYS & GIRLS GIFTS】- The fidget pop spacecraft notebook with pen inspires children's creativity and imagination, and it’s a good tool for anxiety reduction, improving focus and concentration. It's an exciting gifts for boys birthday presents, or any special moment like Easter, Christmas or parties, who is 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 years old
【6 Multicolor Pen】The pop journal for girls comes with a 6 multicolor pen, child will have great experience for writing, drawing or doodling with different colored
